column1: 2004-08-03‚ÄéMenuet OS is an operating system that fits in a single floppy disk. It runs directly off of it

column5: and it's very cool. It includes games

2004-08-09‚ÄéSo a while ago I heard about this program in my favorite tv show
column3: so I downloaded it. I hadn't used it much
column4: but now that I've spent a little more time messing with it
column5: I love it. With this program you can create and broadcast your playlists over the internet. Also you can listen to other people's playlists
column7: and even make picture albums so other people can see them. Oh
column8: and also you can make blogs and publish them so other mercora users can see them

column1: 2004-08-09‚ÄéIf you tired of annoying pop-ups give this program a try. It's called STOPzilla
column2: this pop-up blocker really works. It's not free
column4: but there is a 30 day trial i think. I bought and I've using it for about 1 year and i haven't had any pop-ups. It also stops spyware and other programs like that. So check it out. You can find more information at www.stopzilla.com. Or if you want a great browser that has a built-in pop-up blocker and without the flaws of IE check out Mozilla Firefox at www.mozilla.org and it's open source so it's free.  urlLink
